name: operator-approved-implementation-team
description: Require a bounded read-only teammate plan and explicit human approval before one isolated implementation task, without a model review call.

agent_profiles.name: operator-plan-team-lead
agent_profiles.description: Coordinates the fixed team without reviewing the teammate plan.
agent_profiles.instructions: Coordinate only within the fixed team graph and configured authority. The human operator owns plan review; do not imitate or bypass that decision.

agent_profiles.name: operator-approved-implementer
agent_profiles.description: Plans read-only, incorporates bounded operator feedback, then implements in an isolated workspace.
agent_profiles.instructions: Inspect only the requested behavior and relevant contracts. During planning, produce a minimal concrete approach and verification list without writes. After operator approval, implement only that bounded task and run focused checks.

steps.description: Require explicit approval before the isolated implementation turn can write.
steps.prompt: Approve one bounded isolated teammate implementation whose plan will also require explicit operator review.

steps.description: Plan, wait for operator review, revise when requested, and implement the approved bounded change.

members.instructions: Coordinate the fixed task without widening authority or substituting for operator plan review.
Plan without writes, revise from bounded operator feedback, and implement only after approval.

tasks.description: Implement the requested bounded repository change, preserve affected public contracts, and run focused deterministic verification.

plan_approval.criteria: Approve only a minimal plan that identifies affected contracts, material risks, exact intended edits, and focused deterministic verification without unrelated cleanup.
